per_outcome.operationalization: Binary indicator of whether any output-related activity (commits, PRs, etc.) was recorded on a given day, following Shen (2023) definition
Binary indicator of whether any output-related activity was recorded on a given day, following Holub and Thies (2023) definition
Binary indicator of PR merge activity on a given day; ratio calculated as closed PRs that were merged divided by total PRs closed
Binary indicator of whether any pull request was opened on a given day
Binary indicator of activity; measures task complexity/scope via average lines of code added per opened pull request
Binary indicator of activity; measures task complexity/scope via average lines of code added per merged pull request
Binary indicator of whether any easy-labeled issue was closed on a given day; measures task selection/complexity choice
Binary indicator of whether any interactive activity (comments, reviews, discussions) was recorded on a given day; measures collaboration/communication
Binary indicator of whether any output-related GitHub activity occurred on a given day
Binary indicator of whether any code commit was recorded on a given day
Binary indicator of whether any pull request was merged (accepted by repository owners) on a given day
Binary indicator of activity; measures task complexity/scope via average number of files edited per merged pull request
